item.title: Frontier Exploration - Topic Emergence and Hub Creation Threshold
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Topic Emergence and Hub Creation Threshold The Gap The Seed provides clear guidance: “Create hub notes when a topic has 5+ related notes without a central entry point.” But what defines “related”? When exactly should the hub be created—at 3 notes? 5? Before the cluster fully fo...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Self-Contradiction and Evolved Perspective
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Self-Contradiction and Evolved Perspective The Problem Knowledge bases typically handle external contradictions (Source A says X, Source B says Y) and superseded knowledge (Old understanding was X, new understanding is Y).

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management How AI enhances each stage of the knowledge management pipeline.

item.title: Emergence in Knowledge Graphs
item.description: Emergence in Knowledge Graphs Emergence occurs when a system exhibits properties its individual components don’t have alone.

item.title: Exportable Rules
item.description: Exportable Rules Purpose: Drop these rules into any AI agent context file (e.g., CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) to bootstrap a high-quality, AI-maintained knowledge graph on any topic.

item.title: Forward References and Planned Knowledge
item.description: Forward References and Planned Knowledge When building a knowledge base, you often need to reference concepts that don’t exist yet — future topics, planned projects, or ideas you’ll develop later.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Adaptation and Transcoding Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Adaptation and Transcoding Knowledge Knowledge about transforming knowledge from one representation to another — arrangement, transcription, porting, and cross-context adaptation.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Ingredient Substitution Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Ingredient Substitution Knowledge The Gap The Seed handles conditional/troubleshooting knowledge with if-then branches and user situational constraints (time, budget, equipment).

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Context Frames
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Context Frames When does the same core knowledge need different presentations for different contexts? How do you handle purpose-specific variants without fragmenting the vault? The Problem The Seed addresses expertise levels (beginner/intermediate/advanced) and user ...
